title: Roles & Permissions
description: Define roles and assign granular permissions to control what users can access and modify in Parthenon. Roles use a domain-based permission model covering data sources, cohorts, analyses, vocabulary, administration, and more.
tips: Each role can have any combination of permissions across different domains.
The super-admin role has all permissions by default and cannot be deleted.
Use the permission matrix to quickly see which roles have access to which features.
Changes to roles take effect immediately for all users assigned to that role.
Create separate roles for researchers, data engineers, and administrators for proper access control.
